category_sources: source_facts.description says QDBM is a library of routines for managing a database; official QDBM page describes key/value records organized as hash table or B+ tree.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is qdbm; official homepage title is "QDBM: Quick Database Manager".
docs_sources: Official QDBM homepage includes a Documents section and links Fundamental Specifications at dbmx.net/qdbm/spex.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official QDBM homepage provides source packages and documentation, but no official source-control repository was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official QDBM overview describe a database library for key/value records, hash tables, B+ trees, and C APIs.
